scripts.setup:backend: cd apps/backend && python3 -m venv .venv && .venv/bin/pip install -e .[dev] && .venv/bin/pip install uvicorn
scripts.setup: npm run setup:frontend && npm run setup:backend
scripts.dev:backend: cd apps/backend && export LD_LIBRARY_PATH="/nix/store/$(ls /nix/store | grep stdenv-linux | head -n 1)/lib" && .venv/bin/python -m uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000
scripts.clean: rm -rf node_modules apps/frontend/node_modules apps/frontend/.next apps/backend/.venv apps/backend/**/*.pyc apps/backend/__pycache__
